_note: Canonical progress file for Antrac ERP. Updated by Claude Code at the end of every build phase. Read by VOID DECK dashboard and Hermes. DO NOT hand-edit — update via Claude Code session.
name: Antrac ERP
phase_current: AI Integration (Gemini Flash) — all 3 placements live
phase_next: UI Polish — visual consistency pass + QA audit M/L items
notes: AI live via Gemini Flash REST (src/lib/services/ai.ts, no SDK). 3 surgical placements: (1) Command Center AI Brief (AiBrief.tsx, lit up the old stub, 1hr cache); (2) GM price-comparison recommendation in PurchaseRequestDetail (advisory); (3) mechanic diagnosis assist (AiDiagnosisHint.tsx) on submitted tickets. All advisory/read-only, graceful no-key fallback. Needs VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.local. Build clean at 88%. v0.13.0.

phases.label: Phase 2A
phases.title: Scaffold, Auth, Routing, Mock Data, UI Kit
phases.notes: Base app shell, Firebase auth stub, Tailwind design tokens, component primitives

phases.label: Phase 2B-prep
phases.title: Firestore Rules, Indexes, Seed Files
phases.notes: Security rules drafted, composite indexes defined

phases.label: Firebase Init
phases.title: Firebase Project Live + Rules/Indexes Deployed
phases.notes: .firebaserc, firebase.json, rules and indexes deployed to antrac-erp project

phases.label: Seed
phases.title: Admin Seed — 4 Orgs, 5 Sites, Super Admin
phases.notes: seed/admin-seed.ts, Firestore pre-populated with WLI master data

phases.label: WF Phase 1
phases.title: 11-Actor Role Model + Rules Realigned
phases.notes: Roles: super_admin, director, cfo, antrac_finance, holding_hr, gm, supervisor, proc_staff, finance_wli, inventory_staff, mechanic, operator, mpl_manager

phases.label: WF Phase 2
phases.title: Workflow Engine + 4 Declarative State Machines
phases.notes: engine.ts, executor.ts, ticket / purchase-request / purchase-order / fuel-request machines

phases.label: WF Phase 3
phases.title: Executor → Firestore, Timeline, Notifications, Side-Effects
phases.notes: executeTransition atomic batch, timeline subcollections, notification collection, side-effect handlers

phases.label: WF Phase 4
phases.title: Live UI — Tickets, Registers, Command Center, Act-As
phases.notes: TransitionPanel, Timeline, Sidebar, NotificationBell, ActorSwitcher, RoleInbox, all registers live

phases.label: Procurement Deep-Dive
phases.title: RFQ Sourcing, Competitive Quotes, GM Award, PO Docs, 4-Tier Payment
phases.notes: Iterative RFQ matrix, quote comparison, GM split-award, PO per supplier, payment chain. Live-tested end-to-end.

phases.label: v0.6.0 Milestone
phases.title: Phase 4 + Procurement Complete — Tagged
phases.notes: Git tag v0.6.0. Two full workflows live-tested.

phases.label: CRM Phase A
phases.title: Money Foundation — Currency + GST 8%
phases.notes: money.ts (Currency, GST_RATE=0.08, computeTotals, formatMoney), CurrencySelector component, PO doc retrofitted with subtotal+GST+total rows, PO detail UI shows breakdown

phases.label: CRM Phase B
phases.title: Roles + Asset Commercial Status
phases.notes: sales_staff + ops_staff roles added. AssetCommercialStatus (available/soft_reserved/deployed) on Asset type. createAsset defaults to available.

phases.label: CRM Phase C
phases.title: Customer Register (Module A)
phases.notes: types/crm.ts (Customer, Enquiry, Quotation, WorkOrder, Invoice, Payment), Firestore CRUD service, Customer list+create page, Customer detail with KPI tiles + activity shell. Routes: /wli/crm/customers

phases.label: CRM Phase D
phases.title: Sales Workflow — Enquiry → Quotation (Module B)
phases.notes: enquiry.ts (10-state machine), work-order.ts (7-state machine), quotation.ts (buildQuotationHtml — letterhead, rate table, mob/demob, GST 8%, GM signature). EnquiryList + NewEnquiry + EnquiryDetail pages. Sidebar CRM section. Routes: /wli/crm/enquiries

phases.label: CRM Phase E
phases.title: Work Order + Invoice + Payment (Module C)
phases.notes: All 5 side-effect handlers implemented: SOFT_RESERVE_ASSETS, CREATE_WORK_ORDER (auto-creates WO from quotation on quote_accepted), DEPLOY_ASSETS, RELEASE_ASSETS, UPDATE_CUSTOMER_ROLLUPS (live recalc from Firestore). buildInvoiceHtml (letterhead, deductions, GST, payment history). WorkOrderList + WorkOrderDetail pages with inline InvoiceForm (line items + deductions + GST preview), InvoiceCard (download PDF, payment list), inline PaymentForm (amount/method/reference/date). Sidebar Work Orders entry. Routes /wli/crm/work-orders.

phases.label: CRM Phase F
phases.title: Sales + Finance Dashboards
phases.notes: SalesDashboard (/wli/crm/sales): active WOs, open enquiry pipeline, quotes awaiting response, follow-ups, won-this-month, pipeline value, asset utilisation bar. FinanceDashboard (/wli/crm/finance): outstanding invoices (overdue-first), advances + retention held, payments-this-month, asset utilisation %. useCrmData.ts hooks for all 6 CRM collections. Sidebar + router wired. Build clean.

phases.label: Fuel/Water UI
phases.title: Workflow 2 UI — WLI ↔ MPL Fuel/Water
phases.notes: FuelRequestList (open/closed split, WLI inventory balance panel), NewFuelRequest (create form), FuelRequestDetail (full detail, inventory check results, collection info, TransitionPanel all 10 states, live WLI stock card with low-stock warning). fuel.ts service. Sidebar Fuel & Water section. Build clean.

phases.label: Google Maps
phases.title: Fleet Map + Command Center — Live
phases.notes: VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY configured. FleetMapView: roadmap style, auto-fit bounds, labelled markers. Fleet Map + Command Center geo layer live.

phases.label: File Uploads
phases.title: Firebase Storage — Invoices, Receipts, Photos
phases.notes: storage.ts (real Firebase Storage SDK: uploadEntityFile, deleteEntityFile, Attachment type). FileUpload reusable component (progress bar, download links, delete). Wired into PO detail, WorkOrder detail, FuelRequest detail, Ticket detail. storage.rules deployed.

phases.label: Document Vault
phases.title: Centralised Document Vault + View/Download Split + Preview
phases.notes: documents Firestore collection (mirrors all uploads). DocType auto-tagged by entity context. FileUpload: Eye (view inline) + Download as separate actions. Preview modal: images full-screen, PDFs in iframe. DocumentVault page (/wli/documents): filter by entity type + doc type, search, link back to source entity. Firestore rules deployed.

phases.label: OpenWeatherMap
phases.title: Vessel Weather Monitoring Panel
phases.notes: weather.ts service (free-tier current weather, 30-min sessionStorage cache, windCategory helper) + WeatherPanel.tsx on Command Center below stats bar. Per-site tiles: temp, wind (colour-coded calm/moderate/rough), visibility (amber <5km), condition + icon. Wind+visibility = the free-tier marine-safety signals (no wave data on free tier). Graceful no-key fallback. Promise.allSettled so one site failing doesn't blank the panel. VITE_OPENWEATHER_API_KEY in .env.local.

phases.label: AI Integration
phases.title: Gemini Flash — Surgical AI (Price Compare + AI Brief + Diagnosis Assist)
phases.notes: Gemini Flash via REST (gemini-2.0-flash, no SDK) in src/lib/services/ai.ts: generateText + cachedGenerate (sessionStorage). 3 placements ALL DONE: (1) AiBrief.tsx — Command Center ops brief, replaced the 'coming soon' stub, 1hr cache + refresh; (2) PurchaseRequestDetail — 'Ask AI to recommend' on the price-comparison grid, advisory award suggestion; (3) AiDiagnosisHint.tsx — mechanic-only diagnosis assist on submitted tickets. All advisory/read-only, role-gated, graceful no-key fallback. VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.local. Free tier never near limits at WLI scale.

phases.label: UI Polish
phases.title: Visual Refinement — Consistency, Density, UX Cleanup
phases.notes: Audit all pages for visual consistency: colour tokens, spacing, card layout, empty states, loading states, error states. Tighten dashboard metric cards. Improve form UX (validation feedback, field focus). Standardise table/list layouts. Polish login and transitions. Do after AI integration, before mobile — polish once. BACKLOG ITEM (logged 2026-06-01): FleetMapView marker labels overlap when sites are geographically close (Goidhoo/Muthaafushi, Thilafushi/Malé HQ, Bodufinolhu) — add marker clustering or offset labels.

phases.label: Mobile Responsive
phases.title: Full Mobile Layout — Responsive Redesign
phases.notes: Full responsive audit and redesign. Desktop-first currently — several pages (procurement matrix, PO detail, invoice form) break on small screens. Approach: mobile-first layout pass on all 30+ pages, sidebar → bottom nav on mobile, table → card list on small screens, form layout stacking. Do last — needs features + polish stable first.

phases.label: Cloud Functions
phases.title: Move Side-Effects Server-Side
phases.notes: Side-effects currently run client-side under actor auth (coarse rules). Hardening: move to Cloud Functions for proper authority isolation. Not MVP-blocking — app-level gating is solid.

backlog.title: Code Split (bundle >500KB warning)
backlog.notes: Dynamic import() to split vendor chunks. Deferred until feature-complete.

backlog.title: PDF/Gemini — Docs + AI Price Comparison
backlog.notes: Docs are HTML/print-PDF. Gemini comparison stubbed. Real integration deferred.

backlog.title: Google Popup Login Race Condition
backlog.notes: Sometimes needs 2 attempts. Persistence/race issue in AuthContext. Fix later.
